calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-27-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for the San Francisco Public Administrator.

No appearance was made by Kenneth Kamei or Lydia Uchida-Sakai. Mr. Ferdon stated that he had not heard from Mr. Kamei. An Order to Show Cause re contempt will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney for failure to appear and for failure to submit the required order on the Petition For Final Distribution. The return date is June 23, 2009 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR#7077. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Aquino.

Upon further review, Counsel filed the requested documents. The petition for final distribution was granted as of May 27, 2009, (modified order for the same signed). The Order To show Cause will not be issued.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Dec-15-2008 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Nov-10-2008 Continued To Dec-15-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for the San Francisco Public Administrator ("SFPA").

The Court noted that Lydia Uchida-Sakai (Administrator) and Kenneth Kamei (Counsel) were not present. Mr. Ferdon stated that the SFPA was willing to take over the estate, that it could not take over until Counsel did an accounting to determine what was in the estate and that there was some confusion as to the Decedent's interest in the real property. The Court will impose sanctions of $25.00 per day as of today to Counsel and the Administrator. The matter was continued to December 15, 2008. The Citation remains in place.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Karen Farnsworth, CSR#5162. Clerk: R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy D. Murphy.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Oct-15-2008 Continued To Nov-10-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for the San Francisco Public Guardian.

Counsel for the Administrator was not present.

A citation will be issued to the Administrator to appear and show cause as to why he/she should not be removed or pay monetary sanctions of $50.00 per day for failure to file the proper Inventory and Appraisal and the Petition For Final Distribution. Sanctions also apply to the Attorney. The return date is November 10, 2008 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Karen Farnsworth, CSR#5162. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy D. Wong.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Sep-17-2008 Continued To Oct-15-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kenneth Kamei for Lydia Uchida-Sakai. Jonathan Ferdon for the San Francisco Public Administrator.

The Court stated that the Inventory and Appraisal filed was not completed by the Appraiser, that the front page required a total, that item 2 was blank and that Ms. Uchida-Sakai was to appear at today's hearing as a citation was on calendar as well. Mr. Kamei explained that it was difficult for his client to appear as she ran her own business and that he had not heard from the the Referee. The matter was continued to October 15, 2008 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept 204. A completed Inventory and Appraisal, and the Petition For Final Distribution must be filed by October 14, 2008. If not filed by that date, Counsel will be sanctioned $50.00 per day for each day that the completed Inventory and Appraisal, and the Petition For Final Distribution are not filed. The Court stated that the Public Administrator may be involved in the future.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Wong.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Aug-27-2008 Continued To Sep-17-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

A Citation will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney for failure to file the Inventory and Appraisal and for failure to file the Petition For Final Distribution. The return date is September 17, 2008 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If they are not filed, the Administrator will be removed and the Court will appoint the San Francisco Public Administrator.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ J. Alameda Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Aug-13-2008 Continued To Aug-27-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kenneth Kamei on behalf of Lydia Uchida-Sakai.

Counsel states that he has had medical problems which have precluded him from filing the required documentation. Counsel's request for a continuace was granted and the matter was continued to 8-27-08 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Jackie Alameda/Sajja Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jul-16-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

There being no appearance, the Court took the matter off calendar.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jul-02-2008 Continued To Jul-16-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

The matter was continued to July 16, 2008. The Clerk will notify Counsel of the new hearing date.

Judge: Raymond Arata. Reporter: Peggy Tsujimoto CSR#5229. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy K. Sanberg.
